audio_clips.text: Roxette Arisa smiles at the camera, her hair tied back with loose strands, set against a glittery silver background.
She holds her phone up, showing a 5-minute timer.
Roxette Arisa uses a spoolie to brush Glossier Boy Brow in Black brushing through her eyebrows from the inner corner towards the outer tail, using light upward strokes.

She applies the concealer under her eyes, using a dotting motion directly under the eyes and towards the outer corners. She applies more concealer on her forehead, placing dots in the center and spreading them outwards. Then she applies the concealer to her chin and around the mouth area
Using a flat foundation brush, she begins to blend the concealer, starting from the forehead and using gentle, sweeping motions.

Roxette Arisa uses a medium fluffy brush to apply BareMinerals BarePro powder—sweeping from the center of her forehead outward, blending across her cheekbones toward her temples, gently tapping under her eyes to set the powder, then tilting her head.
"Roxette Arisa uses a large fluffly brush to sweep the powder from the hollows of her cheeks up to her temples then blends it along her jawline for a smooth, defined finish."
She sweeps highlighter on her cheekbones towards her temples.
She lightly blends blush on her cheeks, merging smoothly with the highlighter. The complexion now appears more radiant with a subtle glow on the high points of her cheeks.
Roxette curls the outer upper lashes gently to open her eyes.
Roxette Arisa applies lip cream, starting at the center of her upper lip, carefully defining the cupid's bow. She presses her lips together to blend the product evenly, achieving a soft matte finish.
Roxette sprays her face with setting spray, holding the bottle at arm's length and misting her face evenly.

video_name: QUICK & EASY 5 MINUTE MAKEUP TUTORIAL | Roxette Arisa
